title: Amazon SDE Mock Test 1
description: Simulates Amazon SDE online assessment: Data Structures, Algorithms, and problem-solving questions.
questions: What is the time complexity of accessing an element in an array by index?
What is the time complexity of inserting a node at the beginning of a singly linked list?
How do you detect a cycle in a linked list efficiently?
What is the time complexity of reversing a singly linked list iteratively?
What traversal of a Binary Search Tree gives elements in sorted order?
What is the average time complexity for search, insert, and delete in a balanced Binary Search Tree?
What is the time complexity of Binary Search?
What is the average time complexity for insert, search, and delete operations in a Hash Table?
What is a collision in a hash table and how is chaining used to resolve it?
What is the difference between BFS and DFS graph traversal?
What is the time complexity of BFS and DFS on a graph with V vertices and E edges?
What is the key characteristic that makes a problem suitable for Dynamic Programming?
What is the time and space complexity of computing Fibonacci(n) using dynamic programming (bottom-up)?
What is the time complexity of extracting the minimum element from a Min-Heap?
What is the key idea behind a Greedy algorithm?
